case_title: ISMAEL SAN JUAN ET AL VS. JUDY HU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,400.00 FILED BY SAN JUAN, ISMAEL CASTILLO, ISAIAS AS TO DEFENDANT HU, JUDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-20-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-25-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN JUAN, ISMAEL CASTILLO, ISAIAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HU, JUDY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT/LANDLORD JUDY HU ACTED IN BAD FAITH BY FAILING TO COMPLY WITH VARIOUS PROVISIONS OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT LAW. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ISMAEL SAN JUAN AND ISIAS CASTILLO ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUDY HU IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 6/6/22. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JUDY HU-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
